chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No. 277 of 2017 along with ITRA No. 278 of 2017 Date Order with signature of Judge Fresh Case. 1) For Orders on office objection No. 18. 2) For Orders on CMA No. 356/17. (Exemption) 3) For hearing of main case. -------------- 06.05.2025. Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, Advocate for Applicant. -------------------- In response to order passed on the last date of hearing, learned Counsel for the Applicant, under instructions, does not press both the Reference Applications along with pending applications. Ordered accordingly. Office to place copy of this order in the connected Reference Application. Acting Chief Justice Judge Ayaz P.S.
